metadata.subject: Arts Education
metadata.description: Advanced students continue ensemble work as members of a professional-level theatre company. This course emphasizes artistic leadership, sophisticated performance at professional standards, and preparation for theatre careers.
metadata.general_description: Advanced ensemble course for professional-level theatre company participation.

big_ideas.statement: Professional-level theatre companies require performers demonstrating artistic maturity and technical mastery.
big_ideas.elaboration: Grade 12 theatre artists perform at sophisticated levels, balance individual interpretation with ensemble vision, and mentor developing performers.

big_ideas.statement: Advanced performers take leadership roles in artistic and organizational aspects of theatre companies.
big_ideas.elaboration: Grade 12 company members contribute to artistic planning, ensemble development, and represent companies in professional and public contexts.

big_ideas.statement: Professional theatre practice demands excellence, discipline, and commitment to artistic and social mission.
big_ideas.elaboration: Grade 12 theatre artists understand and embody professional standards while contributing to company's cultural impact and community engagement.

big_ideas.statement: Advanced ensemble work prepares performers for professional theatre careers or advanced study.
big_ideas.elaboration: Grade 12 students develop professional-level skills, networks, and understanding necessary for careers in professional theatre.

competencies.raw: Perform at professional artistic level with sophistication
i_can_statements: I can execute complex roles with technical precision and artistry
I can maintain professional performance standards
I can demonstrate artistic maturity and nuanced interpretation
I can perform across diverse theatrical styles and genres

competencies.raw: Take leadership and mentoring roles within ensemble
i_can_statements: I can mentor and guide developing company members
I can take responsibility for ensemble standards
I can model professional conduct and artistic commitment
I can contribute to ensemble culture and cohesion
I can perform diverse and demanding roles with confidence
I can bring personal interpretation to roles
I can work skillfully in various theatrical traditions
I can expand artistic range significantly

competencies.raw: Contribute to artistic planning and company development
i_can_statements: I can participate meaningfully in artistic planning
I can help shape company's artistic direction
I can contribute creative ideas and perspectives
I can support company's evolution and innovation

competencies.raw: Understand scripts and characters with sophisticated analysis
i_can_statements: I can analyze characters and scripts in depth
I can understand subtext and dramatic function
I can recognize historical and cultural contexts
I can interpret text with artistic maturity

competencies.raw: Understand professional theatre standards and practices
i_can_statements: I can articulate professional standards in theatre
I can understand company operations and administration
I can appreciate professional approaches to performance
I can recognize excellence in professional theatre

competencies.raw: Reflect on artistic growth and professional readiness
i_can_statements: I can evaluate my development as an advanced performer
I can assess readiness for professional theatre work
I can articulate my artistic identity and strengths
I can envision professional theatre career

competencies.raw: Engage with theatre history, culture, and discourse
i_can_statements: I can understand theatre's historical and cultural significance
I can participate in conversations about contemporary theatre
I can recognize diverse theatrical traditions and voices
I can understand theatre's role in society

competencies.raw: Lead communication and collaboration within ensemble
i_can_statements: I can communicate professionally and effectively
I can facilitate ensemble discussions and decision-making
I can give leadership and clear direction
I can resolve conflicts constructively

competencies.raw: Perform with presence, authenticity, and audience engagement
i_can_statements: I can perform with full artistic presence and commitment
I can engage audiences emotionally and intellectually
I can maintain consistent performance quality
I can adapt to varying performance contexts

competencies.raw: Represent company professionally in all contexts
i_can_statements: I can represent company with professionalism and pride
I can participate effectively in public engagement
I can discuss company work meaningfully
I can contribute to company's public reputation

competencies.raw: Maintain and archive theatrical work and company records
i_can_statements: I can help preserve company's theatrical legacy
I can document performances and processes
I can maintain accurate records and materials
I can contribute to company's historical documentation

competencies.raw: Engage authentically with diverse theatrical traditions
i_can_statements: I can perform respectfully in culturally specific traditions
I can learn from diverse theatrical practices
I can contribute to culturally responsive theatre
I can appreciate global theatre perspectives

competencies.raw: Understand and navigate professional theatre field
i_can_statements: I can understand professional theatre landscape
I can explore diverse theatre career opportunities
I can build professional networks and relationships
I can plan for professional theatre career

competencies.raw: Connect company work to cultural and community impact
i_can_statements: I can understand company's cultural mission and role
I can participate actively in community engagement
I can help make theatre accessible and meaningful
I can recognize theatre's contribution to culture

competencies.raw: Prepare for sustained professional practice in theatre
i_can_statements: I can develop commitment to lifelong theatre practice
I can create plan for professional development
I can understand challenges and rewards of theatre careers
I can prepare for transitions into professional theatre

areas.name: Advanced Performance and Character Development
topics: Complex role performance and emotional nuance

areas.name: Leadership and Professional Ensemble Practice
topics: Taking on artistic and organizational leadership
Contributing to company culture and standards

areas.name: Professional Theatre Standards and Practices
topics: Professional standards for performance and conduct

areas.name: Career Development and Professional Pathways
topics: Planning transition into professional theatre careers
